response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below threshold but still at 0.65 (above critical); network-wide deficit and all neighbors' conservative policies mean no surplus capacity exists; accepting would deplete shared reserves needed for system stability—prioritize demand reduction instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.75, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: All geographic neighbors are energy-constrained with conservative policies; network-wide deficit means no peer has surplus capacity; r3c0 must prioritize requesting energy to avoid depletion while suspending all outbound sharing..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
